items.title: Boeing Air Taxi Unit Takes Flight, Joby To Double U.S. Production
items.description: Boeing's air taxi subsidiary, Wisk Aero, completes a test flight. Joby ramps up U.S. production. More eVTOL news this week.

items.title: Jefferies' Sheila Kahyaoglu talks 2026 defense playbook
items.description: Sheila Kahyaoglu, Jefferies, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk the state of the aerospace and defense sectors and her 2026 defense investing playbook.

items.title: Copa Holdings' November 2025 Traffic Improves Year Over Year
items.description: CPA posts November traffic with RPM up 10.2% while load factor rose to 86.2% as demand outpaces capacity growth.

items.title: Massive Breakout in Industrials: 3 Must-Watch Stocks Now
items.description: The industrials sector is showing signs of leadership, with XLI breaking out of a lengthy consolidation and outperforming the broader market in the short term.

items.title: Investors Heavily Search The Boeing Company (BA): Here is What You Need to Know
items.description: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Boeing (BA) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.
